pi_items.source: Queried 'world_capitals' table in world_survey.gpkg and extracted WKB geometry to verify exact coordinates.

privileged_info_summary: The target GeoPackage 'world_survey.gpkg' contains real-world capital city data. Direct inspection of the 'world_capitals' table confirms that Tokyo's record has attributes name='Tokyo', country='Japan', and continent='Asia'. Parsing its binary WKB geometry validates the exact coordinates at longitude 139.6917 and latitude 35.6895.
